title: phanerophlebia haitiensis
intro: Phanerophlebia haitiensis, also known as Haitian Phanerophlebia, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phanerophlebia haitiensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are prepared by steeping the leaves in hot water.
